calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-26-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant GR Express Inc. a/k/a GR Express Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:14 a.m., adjourning at 11:16 a.m. and reconvening at 11:18 a.m.

Eric Gowey, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc.
Benjamin Seeman, Senior Billing & Collection Manager and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Messrs. Hoar & Seeman appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant GR Express Inc. a/k/a GR Express Inc.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Open Book Account, Account Stated, Reasonable Value and Breach of Contract was filed on December 10, 2021.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents occurred on February 28, 2022. {Acknowledgment & Receipt of Service}
Default as to defendant GR Express Inc. a/k/a GR Express Inc, was entered on April 14, 2022.
DOE defendants were dismissed on June 1, 2022.

Plaintiff Creditors AdjustmentBureau, Inc. submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Contracts for GR Express...................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Charge Summary.............................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Assignment to Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc.............................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of
Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc., and against the defaulted defendant GR Express Inc. a/k/a GR Express Inc, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $58,503.60.
Prejudgment Interest - 16,531.05.
Attorney Fees - $1,380.00.
Costs - $809.54.

Total - $77,224.19.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings concluded at 11:28 a.m.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-29-2022 Continued To Sep-14-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2022 Continued To Jul-13-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
